title: Create: Ponder
description: A lightweight Create modpack for the Create: Ponder server.
body:
Ponder is a simple and elegant modpack focused around the create mod, keeping in mind the core aesthetics and style of the Create mod to avoid clash in visuals and gameplay.

![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad25e5cbc0bb90cfbc75e752db16cd8298565f0a.png)

**This modpack is not finished, and will likely change significantly over the next few weeks as of 09/02/25. Many mods will be added and a few likely removed.**

It was designed for the Create: Ponder, server and youtube series. (Coming Soon)
[https://discord.gg/xKsaCQSY](https://discord.gg/xKsaCQSY)
